urls.title: YouTube URL(s)
urls.description: One or more YouTube video URLs to extract transcripts from.

language.title: Preferred Language (Optional)
language.description: Optional. Preferred transcript language code e.g. 'en', 'hi', 'es'. If not available or left empty, automatically picks whatever language YouTube has — so transcript is ALWAYS fetched regardless of language.

includeTimestamps.title: Include Timestamps
includeTimestamps.description: Show [MM:SS] before each caption line. If false, captions are merged into clean readable paragraphs.

includeMetadata.title: Include Cover Page
includeMetadata.description: Add a cover page with video title, channel, duration, views and description.

cleanTranscript.title: Clean Transcript
cleanTranscript.description: Remove annotations like [Music], [Applause], (laughter) from the transcript.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy is required when running on Apify cloud to bypass YouTube IP blocks. Use Apify Residential Proxy for best results. Each user pays for their own proxy usage independently.
proxyConfiguration.sectionDescription: YouTube blocks requests from cloud provider IPs (AWS, GCP etc.). A proxy routes requests through a residential IP to avoid this.
